query:
UPDATE games
SET 
  awayModelSpread = NULL,
  homeModelSpread = NULL,
  modelTotal = NULL,
  modelAwayML = NULL,
  modelHomeML = NULL,
  modelAwayScore = NULL,
  modelHomeScore = NULL,
  modelOverRate = NULL,
  modelUnderRate = NULL,
  modelAwayWinPct = NULL,
  modelHomeWinPct = NULL,
  modelSpreadClamped = NULL,
  modelTotalClamped = NULL,
  modelCoverDirection = NULL,
  modelRunAt = NULL,
  modelAwaySpreadOdds = NULL,
  modelHomeSpreadOdds = NULL,
  modelOverOdds = NULL,
  modelUnderOdds = NULL,
  spreadEdge = NULL,
  spreadDiff = NULL,
  totalEdge = NULL,
  totalDiff = NULL
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM'
  AND gameDate = '2026-03-19'
  AND awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL;
